tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 牆有茨，不可埽也，中冓之言，不可道也，所可道也，言之醜也。 牆有茨，不可襄也，中冓之言，不可詳也，所可詳也，言之長也。 牆有茨，不可束也，中冓之言，不可讀也，所可讀也，言之辱也。

The tribulus grows on the wall, And cannot be brushed away. The story of the inner chamber Cannot be told. What would have to be told AVould be the vilest of recitals.
2 The tribulus grows on the wall, And cannot be removed. The story of the inner chamber Cannot be particularly related. What might be particularly related Would be a long story.
3 The tribulus grows on the wall, And cannot be bound together, [and taken away]. The story of the inner chamber Cannot be recited. What might he recited Would be the most disgraceful of things.
